Notice Of Motion And Motion For Referees Final Report Of Sale Of Real Property Located At 1701-1703 Broderick Street Pursuant To Amended Interlocutory Judgment Dated July 31, 2020; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Approval Of Referee Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Apr-07-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Amy Herrington; Harrington Law, P.C.; 415-558-7700; Referee, appearing via Zoom on her own behalf.
Ross Madden; 415-567-1212; counsel for defendant Andrea Scott-Finney appearing via Zoom.
Andrea Finney; defendant appearing via Zoom.

Bidders attending via Zoom:

Dierdre Scott / Tatyana Mironova, Remark Realty.
Alfred Scott and Sterling Scott.
Jake Michaels and Greg Michaels / Team Forss.
Chris Lou and Patricia Tinitigan / Jenniefer Chann, Redfin.
Michael Murdock.

Ms. Harrington closes bidder registration at 9:58am and commences with the sale of real property with an original bid in the amount of $1,380,001.00, and minimum overbid of $1,449,501.05. Auction ends with Dierdre Scott as the highest bidder, for the sale price of $1,559,501.05.

The court rules as follows: Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Referees Final Report Of Sale Of Real Property Located At 1701-1703 Broderick Street
Off Calendar Apr-07-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Amy Herrington; Harrington Law, P.C.; 415-558-7700; Referee, appearing via Zoom on her own behalf.
Ross Madden; 415-567-1212; counsel for defendant Andrea Scott-Finney appearing via Zoom.

Dierdre Scott / Tatyana Mironova, Remark Realty.
Alfred Scott and Sterling Scott.
Jake Michaels and Greg Michaels / Team Forss.
Chris Lou and Patricia Tinitigan / Jenniefer Chann, Redfin.
Michael Murdock.

Ms. Harrington closes bidder registration at 9:58am and commences with the sale of real property with an original bid in the amount of $1,380,001.00, and minimum overbid of $1,449,501.05. Auction ends with Dierdre Scott as the highest bidder, for the sale price of $1,559,501.05.

The court rules as follows: OTHER AMY HARRINGTON Notice Of Motion And Motion For Referees Final Report Of Sale Of Real Property Located At 1701-1703 Broderick Street is GRANTED. The court confirms the sale of real property of 1701-1703 Broderick Street, in the overbid amount of $1,559,501.05 to Dierdre Scott. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Referees Final Report Of Sale Of Real Property Located At 1678 Grove Street
Off Calendar Jan-21-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom:
Amy Harrington, Esq., 415-558-7700, Referee

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

OTHER AMY HARRINGTON Notice Of Motion And Motion For Referees Final Report Of Sale Of Real Property Located At 1678 Grove Street is OFF CALENDAR, duplicate entry. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Referees Final Report Of Sale Of Real Property Located At 1678 Grove Street, Pursuant To Amended Interlocutory Judgment Dated July 31, 2020; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Approval Of Referee Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jan-21-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom:
Amy Harrington, Esq., 415-558-7700, Referee.

Ms. Harrington stated that notice has been properly served. Furthermore Ms. Harrington gets verbal confirmation from all participants Zoom that they verbally agree to conduct the auction via Zoom. Ms. Harrington commences with the sale of the real property.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

OTHER AMY HARRINGTON Notice Of Motion And Motion For Referees Final Report Of Sale Of Real Property Located At 1678 Grove Street, Pursuant To Amended Interlocutory Judgment Dated July 31, 2020; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Approval Of Referee Fees And Costs is GRANTED
The Court confirms the sale of real property of 1678 Grove Street, San Francisco, CA., in the overbid amount of $2,009,250.00 to Sam Hunt. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order that conforms to the tentative ruling. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Referee?S Final Report Of Sale Of Real Property Pursuant To Amended Interlocutory Judgment Dated July 31, 2020; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Approval Of Referee Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Dec-08-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via zoom:
Amy Harrington, Esq., 415-558-7700, appearing for other.

Hearing is held. The Court questioned if everyone that was entitled to notice has recieved it and if there were any objections to the sale being conducted via zoom. Ms. Harrington reported that notice was given, conducted roll call and asked all parties if they consented to the sale via zoom. All parties present gave their consent.

Ms. Harrington read the discription of the real property from the motion papers and conducted the auction. At the conclusion of the overbid process, the real property known as 1701- 1703 Broderick Street, San Francisco was sold for $1,905,500.00 to Anna Coles representing the original buyers.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

OTHER AMY HARRINGTON Motion For Referee'S Final Report Of Sale Of Real Property Pursuant To Amended Interlocutory Judgment Dated July 31, 2020; Approval Of Referee Fees And Costs is held (see mini minutes for details). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Referees Final Report Of Sale
Off Calendar Dec-08-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via zoom:
Amy Harringston, Esq., 415-558-7700, appearing for other.

OTHER AMY HARRINGTON'S Motion For Referees Final Report Of Sale is OFF CALENDAR, duplicate entry. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
